statement: In every magma, Equation 4160 (`x * y = ((y * x) * z) * x`) implies Equation 3595 (`x * y = z * ((x * w) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0412
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op y x) z) x)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op (op x w) y))
